overall.description: A slow cinematic walk through a grand gothic great hall reminiscent of a magical school dining hall, featuring floating candle chandeliers, long wooden dining tables with seated figures, and large stained glass windows. The scene is rendered in a high-quality game engine with warm golden lighting and detailed stone architecture.

scene_state.functional_zone: gothic great hall with floating candles and long dining tables

segments.scene_description: The camera slowly advances through a magnificent gothic great hall filled with floating candle chandeliers casting warm golden light. Long wooden dining tables line both sides of the central aisle, occupied by students eating and conversing. At the far end, large stained glass windows glow with daylight, while tall stone pillars support the ornate vaulted ceiling above.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement through a magnificent gothic great hall that advances from the warm glow of floating lights toward the bright daylight of distant windows. It begins by gliding down a central aisle, passing beneath ornate vaulted ceilings supported by towering stone pillars. As the camera moves forward, it drifts past long wooden dining tables where students are seated, eating and conversing in the golden light cast by floating candle chandeliers. The scene then opens up toward the far end of the hall, where the warm interior illumination gradually gives way to the vivid light streaming through large, glowing stained glass windows.
